allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Genesys Now website with mobile responsiveness and hero background

- Added complete responsive design for all breakpoints (desktop, tablet, mobile)
- Integrated hero background image (bghero.png)
- Updated logo implementation (logoGenesys.svg)
- Optimized for mobile devices with proper touch targets
- Removed animations for immediate content visibility
- All sections fully responsive and accessible

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(git commit -m "Rename to index.html for GitHub Pages deployment")
